channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alan Davies reflects on past excesses, childhood trauma and cancer diagnosis in interview
item.description: In this in-depth interview, comedian and actor Alan Davies reflects on his life, career, and personal struggles as he approaches his 60s. He discusses his experiences in the 1990s stand-up comedy circ...

item.title: Pilgrims complete symbolic stoning ritual in Mina as Hajj concludes
item.description: Muslim pilgrims taking part in the annual Hajj pilgrimage have performed the final major ritual of stoning the devil in the valley of Mina, near Makkah. From early morning, more than 1.7 million pilgr...

item.title: CNN panel debates Trump administration proposal for federal employee nondisclosure agreements
item.description: A CNN panel discussion highlighted a heated debate over a Trump administration proposal that would require federal employees to sign nondisclosure agreements (NDAs). The Office of Personnel Management...

item.title: Republican Rep. Mike Flood faces criticism over Trump policies at Nebraska town hall
item.description: Republican U.S. Representative Mike Flood of Nebraska faced intense scrutiny during a town hall meeting in Norfolk, where constituents repeatedly challenged him over his support for policies associate...

item.title: Vintage Photos Highlight Richard Burton’s Legendary Career and Charismatic Presence
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday revisits the life and legacy of acclaimed Welsh actor Richard Burton, presenting a collection of vintage photographs that capture his unmistakable charisma and comman...

item.title: ASUS unveils ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro WiFi 8 router prototype awarded at Computex 2026
item.description: The ASUS ROG Rapture GT-BN98 Pro WiFi 8 router has been recognized with a Computex Best Choice Award in the Gaming and Immersive Tech category, highlighting ASUS’s continued push into next-generation ...

item.title: Concerns raised after crowds entered protected Hampstead Heath ponds during swan nesting season
item.description: Large crowds gathered at the protected wildlife ponds of Hampstead Heath during the recent UK heatwave, prompting criticism from local residents, wildlife advocates and animal welfare experts. Despite...

item.title: US Exhausts 2026 EB-2 Green Card Quota for Indian Applicants Until Next Fiscal Year
item.description: The US State Department has announced that all available EB-2 employment-based immigrant visas allocated to Indian nationals for fiscal year 2026 have been fully used. The EB-2 category is intended fo...

item.title: Experts dispute Stephen Miller’s claim that budget could be balanced through eliminating improper payments
item.description: Stephen Miller, White House Deputy Chief of Staff, sparked criticism after suggesting that the U.S. federal budget could be balanced if government payments were only made to individuals fully eligible...

item.title: National Assembly and Senate to Form Mediation Committee Over Revenue Sharing Dispute
item.description: Kenya’s Parliament is set to establish a mediation committee after the National Assembly rejected amendments proposed by the Senate on the Division of Revenue Bill. The disagreement centres on how rev...

item.title: Russian Foreign Ministry Warns of Major Impending Strikes on Kiev Military Targets
item.description: The Russian Foreign Ministry issued a formal statement on May 25 announcing planned systematic strikes on Ukrainian military-industrial facilities in Kiev, including sites involved in drone design, pr...

item.title: Knicks sweep Cavaliers in Eastern Conference Finals to reach NBA Finals for first time since 1999
item.description: The New York Knicks delivered a commanding performance in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Finals, defeating the Cleveland Cavaliers 130-93 to complete a 4-0 series sweep and secure their first NBA Fi...

item.title: Ken Paxton Defeats John Cornyn in Texas GOP Senate Runoff Following Trump Endorsement
item.description: Republican Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton won the Texas Republican Senate runoff election against incumbent Senator John Cornyn, a result that political analysts said demonstrated former President ...

item.title: Court Ruling On Jonathan’s 2027 Eligibility, Party Primaries And Major Political Developments Dominate Nigerian Headlines
item.description: The major Nigerian newspaper headlines for Wednesday, 27th May 2026 focused mainly on political developments ahead of the 2027 general elections. One of the biggest stories na the Federal High Court r...

item.title: Sinner and Sabalenka advance to second round after straight-set wins at French Open
item.description: Jannik Sinner and Aryna Sabalenka start their French Open campaign on a strong note as both world number ones comfortably moved into the second round at Roland Garros. Sinner, who is currently on a ho...

item.title: Michael Jackson Makes Surprise Appearance on SMAP×SMAP in Japan in 2006
item.description: On May 31, 2006, Michael Jackson made an unexpected and highly memorable appearance on the popular Japanese variety show SMAP×SMAP, hosted by the iconic J-pop group SMAP. The segment, which later aire...

item.title: Cookware Companies Clash Over PFAS Advertising Claims and Chemical Safety
item.description: The cookware industry is facing a growing legal and public relations dispute centered on per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS), commonly known as “forever chemicals,” used in nonstick cookware. A...

item.title: Michael Wolff Speculates on Donald Trump’s Health and the Future of His Second Presidency
item.description: A recent article from Raw Story highlights comments made by journalist and Trump biographer Michael Wolff during an episode of the podcast 'Inside Trump's Head,' which he co-hosts with Daily Beast exe...

item.title: Ken Paxton Faces Online Criticism After Runoff Victory Speech in Texas Senate Race
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton won the Republican runoff election for the U.S. Senate seat currently held by Sen. John Cornyn, securing his place in the November general election against Democratic...

item.title: CNN Panelists Clash Over Texas Senate Race Between James Talarico and Ken Paxton
